1|/**
     2| * IVX crash-safe task state store — durable, block-structured, resumable.
     3| *
     4| * A large owner task is split into ordered BLOCKS. Each block is executed one at
     5| * a time and its result is persisted before the next block starts, so a crash,
     6| * reload, or timeout loses at most the single in-flight block — never the whole
     7| * task and never the original owner command.
     8| *
     9| * Durable layout (survives process restarts):
    10| *   logs/audit/task-orchestrator/<taskId>/task.json    → task metadata + cursor
    11| *   logs/audit/task-orchestrator/<taskId>/blocks.json  → full ordered block array
    12| *   logs/audit/task-orchestrator/<taskId>/events.jsonl → append-only crash/forensics log
    13| *
    14| * task.json holds the cursor (`currentBlockIndex`) + roll-ups (completed/failed/
    15| * blocked ids). blocks.json is rewritten atomically on every block update so the
    16| * latest status of each block is always on disk. events.jsonl is append-only so a
    17| * crash mid-write to blocks.json can still be reconstructed/audited.

#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

TOKEN="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"
REPO="ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest"
BASE_SHA="c18c983ac79180418c06e1fa160aef9c72e427b6"
BASE_TREE="f030278255d4bc7acbf00e0fbfbb3eecdcddfdbd"

# Files to push (path => local path)
declare -A FILES=(
  ["backend/hono.ts"]="backend/hono.ts"
  ["backend/services/ivx-deploy-dedup.ts"]="backend/services/ivx-deploy-dedup.ts"
  ["backend/services/ivx-render-env-merge.ts"]="backend/services/ivx-render-env-merge.ts"
  ["backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-runtime.ts"]="backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-runtime.ts"
  ["backend/tests/ivx-deploy-dedup.test.ts"]="backend/tests/ivx-deploy-dedup.test.ts"
  ["backend/tests/ivx-github-path.test.ts"]="backend/tests/ivx-github-path.test.ts"
  ["backend/tests/ivx-live-work-persistence.test.ts"]="backend/tests/ivx-live-work-persistence.test.ts"
  ["backend/tests/ivx-render-env-merge.test.ts"]="backend/tests/ivx-render-env-merge.test.ts"
  ["bun.lock"]="bun.lock"
  ["package.json"]="package.json"
)

echo "=== Creating blobs for ${#FILES[@]} files ==="

# Build tree entries JSON
TREE_ENTRIES="[""
FIRST=true

for path in "${!FILES[@]}"; do
  local_path="${FILES[$path]}"
  content=$(base64 -w 0 "$local_path")
  
  # Create blob
  BLOB_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST \
    -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    "https://api.github.com/repos/$REPO/git/blobs" \
    -d "{\"content\":\"$content\",\"encoding\":\"base64\"}")
  
  BLOB_SHA=$(echo "$BLOB_RESP" | grep -o '"sha":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4)
  
  if [ -z "$BLOB_SHA" ]; then
    echo "FAILED to create blob for $path"
    echo "$BLOB_RESP" | head -5
    exit 1
  fi
  
  echo "  Blob: $path => $BLOB_SHA"
  
  if [ "$FIRST" = true ]; then
    FIRST=false
  else
    TREE_ENTRIES+=","
  fi
  
  TREE_ENTRIES+="{\"path\":\"$path\",\"mode\":\"100644\",\"type\":\"blob\",\"sha\":\"$BLOB_SHA\"}"
done

TREE_ENTRIES+="]"

echo "=== Creating tree ==="
TREE_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  "https://api.github.com/repos/$REPO/git/trees" \
  -d "{\"base_tree\":\"$BASE_TREE\",\"tree\":$TREE_ENTRIES}")

NEW_TREE_SHA=$(echo "$TREE_RESP" | grep -o '"sha":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4)

if [ -z "$NEW_TREE_SHA" ]; then
  echo "FAILED to create tree"
  echo "$TREE_RESP" | head -10
  exit 1
fi

echo "  New tree: $NEW_TREE_SHA"

echo "=== Creating commit ==="
COMMIT_RESP=$(curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  "https://api.github.com/repos/$REPO/git/commits" \
  -d "{\"message\":\"feat: IVX Senior Developer Phase 1-6 hardening — safe Render env merge, GitHub path standardization, deployment dedup, Live Work persistence, failure path tests\",\"tree\":\"$NEW_TREE_SHA\",\"parents\":[\"$BASE_SHA\"]}")

NEW_COMMIT_SHA=$(echo "$COMMIT_RESP" | grep -o '"sha":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4)

if [ -z "$NEW_COMMIT_SHA" ]; then
  echo "FAILED to create commit"
  echo "$COMMIT_RESP" | head -10
  exit 1
fi

echo "  New commit: $NEW_COMMIT_SHA"

echo "=== Updating ref refs/heads/main ==="
REF_RESP=$(curl -s -X PATCH \
  -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  "https://api.github.com/repos/$REPO/git/refs/heads/main" \
  -d "{\"sha\":\"$NEW_COMMIT_SHA\",\"force\":false}")

REMOTE_SHA=$(echo "$REF_RESP" | grep -o '"sha":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4)

if [ "$REMOTE_SHA" = "$NEW_COMMIT_SHA" ]; then
  echo "=== SUCCESS: Remote ref updated to $NEW_COMMIT_SHA ==="
else
  echo "FAILED to update ref"
  echo "$REF_RESP" | head -10
  exit 1
fi
